jsonLd.title: Ustraa is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ustraa! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Coimbatore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ustraa:
Ustraa is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ustraa!
